records.ety: [AS. am, eom, akin to Gothic im, Icel. em, Olr. am, Lith. esmi, L. sum., Gr. <?/, Zend ahmi, Skr. asmi, fr. a root as to be. <?/. See Are, and cf. Be, Was.]

defs: The first person singular of the verb be, in the indicative mode, present tense. See Be.
quotes: God said unto Moses, I am that am.
